creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
I am getting this on vultr.com/netcup.de seems to be happening only on "QEMU" since in AWS or GCE I don't see the error:

Processing event '!system=CAM subsystem=periph type=error device=cd0 serial="QM00003" cam_status="0xcc" scsi_status=2 scsi_sense="70 02 3a 00" CDB="00 00 00 00 00 00 " 

Just in case I am using this kerne:  https://github.com/fabrik-red/images/blob/master/fabrik.kernel
